name: Chocolate Mint Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix chocolate cookie crumbs and melted butter. Press firmly into the bottom of an 8-inch spring-form pan (or use a pie pan if you don't have a spring-form).
2. Bake at 350°F for 7-8 minutes. Cool.
3. Use your electric mixer to prepare the filling: Cream butter until smooth and gradually add the sugar. Melt the chocolate over simmering water in a double boiler or in the microwave.
4. Combine melted chocolate, vanilla, and peppermint extracts and blend into the butter mixture. Add eggs one at a time and beat about 3 minutes after adding each egg.
5. Beat cream until it holds a firm peak. Fold whipped cream into the chocolate mixture.
6. Gently spread into prepared crust. Sprinkle with grated chocolate (or use chocolate sprinkles).
7. Loosely cover with plastic wrap (try not to let the plastic touch the surface of the torte).
8. Chill for at least 3 hours.
YIELD: 10-12 servings
